# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-name
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-name
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-name
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-name
        image: registry-url/service-name:tag
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: service-name
spec:
  selector:
    app: service-name
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 80
  type: LoadBalancer
